SEARCH
Package academicBlock

Class Course

java.lang.Object
academicBlock.Course
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Course extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an academic course. A course contains students, instructors, lessons, marks and course registration requests. More than one teacher can be assigned to the same course.
See Also:

    • requestRegistration

      public CourseRegistration requestRegistration(Student student)
      Creates a pending course registration request for a student. If the student already has a pending request, the existing one is returned.
      Parameters:
      student - student who wants to register
      Returns:
      course registration object
